Meta.title: Propia Digital — Your property, your brand, your guests
Meta.description: We build professional websites for rental property owners in Punta del Este. Stop depending on the big platforms and start building your own brand.

Hero.title: Your property, your brand, your guests.
Hero.subtitle: Stop depending on the big platforms. Start building your brand.

Problem.title: Tired of depending on others to rent your property?
Problem.subtitle: The big platforms give you visibility, but at a cost that often goes unseen.

cards.title: Your account gets closed
cards.text: An unexpected suspension and you lose entire weeks of the high season.

cards.title: You pay high commissions
cards.text: Up to 20% of every booking goes to commissions that come out of your pocket.

cards.title: The guests aren't yours
cards.text: Whoever books stays a customer of the platform, not yours. You can't build loyalty.

Solution.title: Your own website. Your business, your way.
Solution.subtitle: Your entire digital presence in one place, simple and under your control.

benefits.title: We handle all the technical side for you
benefits.text: You focus on welcoming guests. We make sure your website always works.

benefits.title: Know who visits your property
benefits.text: See how many people view your site and from which country, in plain language.

benefits.title: Get a summary every month, without lifting a finger
benefits.text: You receive an email with everything that matters. No logging in, nothing new to learn.

benefits.title: Your guests come back to you
benefits.text: Your clients book directly with you, not a platform. You build your brand.

Calculator.title: How much are you losing in commissions?
Calculator.subtitle: Move the value and see your savings instantly.
Calculator.propiaLabel: With Propia Digital you pay (annual plan)
Calculator.disclaimer: Estimated calculation for illustrative purposes. Real savings depend on your property and season.

Pricing.title: Choose the plan that fits you best
Pricing.subtitle: No surprises. Everything included so your site works from day one.
Pricing.setup: Initial setup: $100 USD + $50 USD per property

Testimonials.title: What our clients say
Testimonials.subtitle: Owners like you who took the step to have their own website.

items.name: Marcela Fernández
items.text: I finally have my own website. My guests write to me directly and I stopped paying huge commissions. The difference shows.

items.name: Roberto Giménez
items.text: I have two properties in La Barra and manage everything from my phone. Simple, elegant and independent.

items.name: Lucía Methol
items.text: The best part is the peace of mind. My brand is mine, my clients are mine. I recommend Propia Digital without hesitation.

Contact.title: Want your website? Let's talk.
Contact.subtitle: We reply in under 24 hours.
Contact.name: Name
Contact.success: Thank you! We received your inquiry and will reply within 24 hours.
Contact.error: There was a problem sending. Try again or write to us on WhatsApp.

Footer.madeFor: Made for property owners in Punta del Este, Uruguay.
